7.name: 溅射
7.desc: <outline color=black width=2>子弹命中后可分裂<color=#FFDD42>3颗</color>穿透子弹</outline>

8.name: 溅射增幅
8.desc: <outline color=black width=2>子弹命中后可分裂子弹数<color=#FFDD42>+1</color></outline>

13.name: 疯狂射击
13.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次子弹射击时,有概率<color=#FFDD42>移除冷却</color>持续<color=#FFDD42>3s</color></outline>

16.name: 散弹
16.desc: <outline color=black width=2>子弹变成近距离散弹,伤害<color=#FFDD42>+1000%</color>暴击率<color=#FFDD42>+5%</color>暴击伤害提升至<color=#FFDD42>2倍</color></outline>

19.name: 寒冰子弹
19.desc: <outline color=black width=2>子弹替换为寒冰弹,命中后有概率减速<color=#FFDD42>40%</color>持续3s</outline>

20.name: 冻结
20.desc: <outline color=black width=2>当子弹为寒冰弹时,命中有概率冻结<color=#FFDD42>1s</color></outline>

22.name: 重型子弹
22.desc: <outline color=black width=2>子弹伤害+2000%但子弹的飞行速度<color=#FFDD42>很慢</color></outline>

23.name: 反弹子弹
23.desc: <outline color=black width=2>子弹可以反弹<color=#FFDD42>1次</color>但速度<color=#FFDD42>-40%</color></outline>

130.name: 疯狂射击
130.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次子弹射击时,有概率<color=#FFDD42>移除冷却</color>持续<color=#FFDD42>3s</color></outline>

1000.name: 混沌之刃
1000.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得混沌之刃，2连击,每次连击伤害都会增加<color=#FFDD42>10%</color>，最后1击必定<color=#FFDD42>暴击</color></outline>

1001.name: 淬毒之刃
1001.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得淬毒之刃,附带<color=#FFDD42>可叠加的中毒效果</color>,持续3秒</outline>

1002.name: 爆裂弓
1002.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得爆裂弓,命中后爆裂出<color=#FFDD42>3支</color>穿透反弹的箭矢</outline>

1003.name: 龙之力
1003.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得龙之力,蓄力发射造成<color=#FFDD42>150%</color>伤害的龙</outline>

1004.name: 雷电之斧
1004.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得雷电之斧,每次命中单位，都会触发<color=#FFDD42>落雷</color></outline>

1005.name: 虚无之剑
1005.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得虚无之剑,释放后,在战场中来回穿梭</outline>

1006.name: 无双重剑
1006.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得无双重剑,攻击方式为横扫且可产生剑刃,攻击距离:近</outline>

1007.name: 太刀鬼切
1007.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得太刀鬼切,一刀六刃,攻击距离:中等</outline>

1008.name: 太刀疾风
1008.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得太刀疾风,挥出龙卷剑刃，对单位造成<color=#FFDD42>多段</color>伤害</outline>

1009.name: 金箍棒
1009.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得金箍棒,围绕自身旋转且会逐渐<color=#FFDD42>变大</color>(攻击距离:近)</outline>

1010.name: 玄武棒
1010.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得玄武棒,竖直向前<color=#FFDD42>翻滚</color></outline>

1011.name: 饼之花
1011.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得饼之花,释放后会逐渐减速并停留在场景中一段时间,攻击距离:中</outline>

1012.name: 磁暴地雷
1012.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得磁暴地雷,爆炸后会产生<color=#FFDD42>4个</color>电球</outline>

1013.name: 激光地雷
1013.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得激光地雷,地雷之间<color=#FFDD42>激光连线</color>,造成持续伤害,攻击距离:近</outline>

1024.name: 脉冲炮
1024.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得脉冲光束,对直线上的单位造成伤害</outline>

1028.name: 手枪
1028.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得手枪,疯狂射击</outline>

1036.name: 旋风斧
1036.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得旋风斧头,围绕自身旋转</outline>

1037.name: 滚石
1037.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得滚石,对路径上的单位造成伤害</outline>

1038.name: 陨石
1038.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得陨石,从天而降</outline>

1039.name: 游侠
1039.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得弓箭,箭无虚发</outline>

1041.name: 枪手
1041.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得左轮枪,发发入魂</outline>

1043.name: 法师
1043.desc: <outline color=black width=2>初始获得火球,可掌控各种元素之力</outline>

1045.name: 陨星锤
1045.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得陨星锤,燃烬一切</outline>

3000.name: 混沌之刃
3000.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得混沌之刃，2连击,每次连击伤害都会增加<color=#FFDD42>10%</color>，最后1击必定<color=#FFDD42>暴击</color></outline>

3001.name: 剧毒之刃
3001.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得淬毒之刃,附带<color=#FFDD42>可叠加的中毒效果</color>,持续3秒</outline>

3002.name: 爆裂弓
3002.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得爆裂弓,命中后爆裂出<color=#FFDD42>3支</color>穿透反弹的箭矢</outline>

3003.name: 龙之力
3003.desc: <outline color=black width=2>获得龙之力,蓄力发射造成<color=#FFDD42>150%</color>伤害的龙</outline>

3004.name: 雷电之斧
3004.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得雷电之斧,每次命中单位，都会触发<color=#FFDD42>落雷</color></outline>

3005.name: 虚无之剑
3005.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得虚无之剑,释放后,在战场中来回穿梭</outline>

3006.name: 无双重剑
3006.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得无双重剑,攻击方式为横扫且可产生剑刃</outline>

3007.name: 太刀鬼切
3007.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得太刀鬼切,一刀六刃</outline>

3008.name: 太刀疾风
3008.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得太刀疾风,挥出龙卷剑刃，对单位造成<color=#FFDD42>多段</color>伤害</outline>

3009.name: 金箍棒
3009.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得金箍棒,围绕自身旋转且会逐渐<color=#FFDD42>变大</color></outline>

3010.name: 玄武棒
3010.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得玄武棒,竖直向前<color=#FFDD42>翻滚</color></outline>

3011.name: 饼之花
3011.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得饼之花,释放后会逐渐减速并停留在场景中一段时间</outline>

3012.name: 磁暴地雷
3012.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得磁暴地雷,爆炸后会产生<color=#FFDD42>4个</color>电球</outline>

3013.name: 激光地雷
3013.desc: <outline color=black width=3>获得激光地雷,地雷之间<color=#FFDD42>激光连线</color>,造成持续伤害</outline>

9063.name: 召唤单位弱化buff
9063.desc: <outline color=black width=2>生命减少95%移速增加200%</outline>

10004.name: 混沌之焰
10004.desc: <outline color=black width=2>混沌之刃附带烈焰效果，命中敌人会<color=#FFDD42>灼烧</color></outline>

10007.name: 重伤
10007.desc: <outline color=black width=2>混沌之刃命中后附带重伤效果,使其受到的伤害<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color>持续<color=#FFDD42>+3s</color>可叠加3层</outline>

10013.name: 剧毒之地
10013.desc: <outline color=black width=2>淬毒之刃命中后有在地上产生毒液对触碰的单位造成<color=#FFDD42>持续伤害</color></outline>

10015.name: 毒液缠身
10015.desc: <outline color=black width=2>淬毒之刃中毒伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color>且中毒效果将持续到<color=#FFDD42>单位死亡</color></outline>

10016.name: 叠加
10016.desc: <outline color=black width=2>淬毒之刃中毒叠加层数<color=#FFDD42>+5</color></outline>

10017.name: 迟钝
10017.desc: <outline color=black width=2>淬毒之刃命中后可以使单位减速<color=#FFDD42>10%</color>持续3s可叠加4次</outline>

10018.name: 毒液专精
10018.desc: <outline color=black width=2>淬毒之刃中毒伤害<color=#FFDD42>+25%</color>中毒伤害间隔<color=#FFDD42>-25%</color></outline>

10022.name: 毁灭爆炸
10022.desc: <outline color=black width=2>爆裂弓命中单位后会产生<color=#FFDD42>毁灭爆炸</color></outline>

10023.name: 爆裂
10023.desc: <outline color=black width=2>爆裂弓爆裂的箭矢数量<color=#FFDD42>+1</color></outline>

10025.name: 天罗地网
10025.desc: <outline color=black width=2>爆裂弓爆裂的箭矢飞行速度<color=#FFDD42>+80%</color>反弹次数<color=#FFDD42>+1</color></outline>

10027.name: 毁灭穿透
10027.desc: <outline color=black width=2>爆裂弓伤害<color=#FFDD42>+150%</color>,穿透数量<color=#FFDD42>+2</color>(可叠加3次)</outline>

10032.name: 黑龙灭世
10032.desc: <outline color=black width=2>龙之力变成<color=#FFDD42>黑龙</color>，移动方式改变，伤害+200%，命中敌人会造成<color=#FFDD42>黑炎灼烧</color></outline>

10039.name: 龙之子
10039.desc: <outline color=black width=2>龙之力命中后会产生<color=#FFDD42>1条</color>小龙</outline>

10041.name: 天降雷
10041.desc: <outline color=black width=2>雷电之斧命中单位时会在随机位置释放<color=#FFDD42>3个</color>落雷</outline>

10043.name: 强力雷击
10043.desc: <outline color=black width=2>雷电之斧触发的落雷伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color></outline>

10044.name: 掌控
10044.desc: <outline color=black width=2>雷电之斧飞出后,会<color=#FFDD42>停留</color>一段时间</outline>

10045.name: 雷霆冲击
10045.desc: <outline color=black width=2>雷电之斧命中后会产生<color=#FFDD42>雷霆冲击</color></outline>

10050.name: 高速飞行
10050.desc: <outline color=black width=2>虚无之剑的飞行速度<color=#FFDD42>+50%</color>伤害<color=#FFDD42>+30%</color></outline>

10064.name: 巨剑式
10064.desc: <outline color=black width=2>无双重剑和其剑刃体积<color=#FFDD42>+25%</color></outline>

10065.name: 真红剑刃
10065.desc: <outline color=black width=2>无双重剑剑刃变为红色,命中单位必定<color=#FFDD42>暴击</color></outline>

10067.name: 一刀流
10067.desc: <outline color=black width=2>无双重剑和剑刃伤害<color=#FFDD42>+500%</color>暴击伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color>但速度<color=#FFDD42>-50%</color></outline>

10072.name: 修罗斩
10072.desc: <outline color=black width=2>太刀鬼切会额外释放<color=#FFDD42>修罗斩</color>伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color></outline>

10078.name: 登龙斩
10078.desc: <outline color=black width=2>太刀鬼切每次释放命中单位伤害都会递增<color=#FFDD42>20%</color>最高10层</outline>

10082.name: 雷电风暴
10082.desc: <outline color=black width=2>龙卷变成雷电风暴，伤害<color=#FFDD42>+200%</color>同时会在四周触发落雷</outline>

10084.name: 狂风式
10084.desc: <outline color=black width=2>龙卷命中后产生<color=#FFDD42>4</color>个小龙卷</outline>

10085.name: 撕裂
10085.desc: <outline color=black width=2>太刀疾风龙卷伤害间隔<color=#FFDD42>-25%</color></outline>

10089.name: 飓风式
10089.desc: <outline color=black width=2>太刀疾风龙卷体积<color=#FFDD42>+80%</color>伤害<color=#FFDD42>+50%</color></outline>

10091.name: 烧火棍
10091.desc: <outline color=black width=2>金箍棒附带火焰效果体积<color=#FFDD42>+10%</color>,命中单位会灼烧</outline>

10093.name: 棒击
10093.desc: <outline color=black width=2>金箍棒旋转结束后会释放1次大范围棒击造成<color=#FFDD42>150%</color>伤害</outline>

10095.name: 定海神针
10095.desc: <outline color=black width=2>金箍棒在旋转期间会释放<color=#FFDD42>定海神针</color>，必定<color=#FFDD42>暴击</color></outline>

10097.name: 棒刃
10097.desc: <outline color=black width=2>金箍棒释放时会产生<color=#FFDD42>棒刃</color></outline>

10098.name: 斗圣
10098.desc: <outline color=black width=2>金箍棒伤害<color=#FFDD42>+300%</color>暴击率<color=#FFDD42>+25%</color>暴击伤害<color=#FFDD42>+100%</color></outline>

10101.name: 回
10101.desc: <outline color=black width=2>玄武棒到达边缘后会<color=#FFDD42>返回</color></outline>

10103.name: 碾
10103.desc: <outline color=black width=2>玄武棒翻滚时会<color=#FFDD42>越来越大</color>,伤害也持续<color=#FFDD42>递增</color></outline>

10112.name: 盛开
10112.desc: <outline color=black width=2>饼之花释放过程会持续产生<color=#FFDD42>旋转花瓣</color></outline>

10114.name: 生长
10114.desc: <outline color=black width=2>饼之花释放后会持续<color=#FFDD42>变大</color></outline>

10117.name: 花生花
10117.desc: <outline color=black width=2>饼之花停留后会产生<color=#FFDD42>饼之花</color></outline>

10119.name: 减速
10119.desc: <outline color=black width=2>饼之花命中后可以使单位减速<color=#FFDD42>20%</color>持续2s</outline>

10123.name: 弹射
10123.desc: <outline color=black width=2>磁暴地雷电球可弹射次数<color=#FFDD42>+1</color></outline>

10125.name: 开花弹
10125.desc: <outline color=black width=2>磁暴地雷爆炸后会发射<color=#FFDD42>大量的电球</color></outline>

10127.name: 电磁
10127.desc: <outline color=black width=2>磁暴地雷爆炸后会产生4次<color=#FFDD42>雷击</color></outline>

10133.name: 红色激光
10133.desc: <outline color=black width=2>激光地雷激光变成红色，每次伤害递增<color=#FFDD42>5%</color>上限100%</outline>

10135.name: 高频激光
10135.desc: <outline color=black width=2>激光地雷的激光连线伤害间隔缩短<color=#FFDD42>25%</color></outline>

10136.name: 持久激光
10136.desc: <outline color=black width=2>大幅增加激光地雷<color=#FFDD42>持续时间</color></outline>

10142.name: 爆破灼烧
10142.desc: <outline color=black width=2>燃烧瓶命中后对周围造成<color=#FFDD42>范围伤害</color></outline>

10150.name: 多重飞斧
10150.desc: <outline color=black width=2>飞斧每次攻击后,下次投掷的飞斧数量<color=#FFDD42>+1</color></outline>

10151.name: 锋利飞斧
10151.desc: <outline color=black width=2>飞斧每次攻击后,下次伤害<color=#FFDD42>+50%</color></outline>

10152.name: 高速飞斧
10152.desc: <outline color=black width=2>飞斧每次攻击后,下次速度<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color></outline>

10153.name: 致命飞斧
10153.desc: <outline color=black width=2>飞斧每次攻击后,下次暴击率<color=#FFDD42>+50%</color></outline>

10160.name: 回旋
10160.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次攻击回旋镖都会<color=#FFDD42>回旋</color></outline>

10190.name: 重伤
10190.desc: <outline color=black width=2>地雷爆炸后重伤单位，使其受到的伤害<color=#FFDD42>+15%</color>持续5秒</outline>

10201.name: 高速之矛
10201.desc: <outline color=black width=2>每次命中目标会增加5%矛的装备速度，持续<color=#FFDD42>5s</color>，可叠加<color=#FFDD42>6次</color></outline>

10213.name: 棒气
10213.desc: <outline color=black width=2>棍棒命中后会产生<color=#FFDD42>棒气</color></outline>

10231.name: 洞穿
10231.desc: <outline color=black width=2>复合弓可穿透多<color=#FFDD42>1</color>个单位</outline>

10242.name: 究极光束
10242.desc: <outline color=black width=2>发射<color=#FFDD42>超大范围的</color>的脉冲光束</outline>

10244.name: 波动
10244.desc: <outline color=black width=2>脉冲光束伤害间隔缩短<color=#FFDD42>25%</color></outline>

10348.name: 导电
10348.desc: <outline color=black width=2>闪电链每次跳跃伤害递增<color=#FFDD42>80%</color></outline>

10359.name: 叉状穿透
10359.desc: <outline color=black width=2>叉状闪电体积<color=#FFDD42>+50%</color>伤害<color=#FFDD42>+50</color>且对穿过的单位也会造成伤害</outline>

10368.name: 旋风斩
10368.desc: <outline color=black width=2>旋风斧头旋转速度<color=#FFDD42>+200%</color>伤害<color=#FFDD42>+150%</color></outline>

10369.name: 飞斧
10369.desc: <outline color=black width=2>旋风斧旋转过程会发射<color=#FFDD42>1把</color>飞斧</outline>

10377.name: 巨石冲击
10377.desc: <outline color=black width=2>滚石滚动期间每秒伤害增加<color=#FFDD42>+20%</color>上限<color=#FFDD42>200%</color></outline>

10378.name: 巨石滚滚
10378.desc: <outline color=black width=2>滚石移动速度<color=#FFDD42>+200%</color>伤害间隔<color=#FFDD42>-50%</color></outline>

10379.name: 石化
10379.desc: <outline color=black width=2>滚石命中单位后有概率石化<color=#FFDD42>1s</color></outline>

10386.name: 巨型陨石
10386.desc: <outline color=black width=2>陨石命中时有概率额外释放1颗<color=#FFDD42>高额伤害</color>的巨型陨石</outline>

10389.name: 燃烧
10389.desc: <outline color=black width=2>陨石命中单位后在地上产生<color=#FFDD42>燃烧</color></outline>

10396.name: 神射手1阶
